filters.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "UNION" or http.request.uri.query contains "SELECT" or http.request.uri.query contains "DROP" or http.request.uri.query contains "OR 1=1" or http.request.uri.query contains "xp_cmdshell" or http.request.uri.query contains "SLEEP(" or http.request.uri.query contains "WAITFOR")

(http.request.uri.query contains "<script" or http.request.uri.query contains "javascript:" or http.request.uri.query contains "onerror=" or http.request.uri.query contains "onload=" or http.request.uri.query contains "alert(" or http.request.uri.query contains "document.cookie")
(http.request.uri.path contains "../" or http.request.uri.query contains "../" or http.request.uri.query contains "/etc/passwd" or http.request.uri.query contains "/proc/self")
